---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something new
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**The problem you're trying to solve**
What can't you do today, or what's painful?

**Your proposed solution**
What would the ideal UX / behavior look like?

**Alternatives considered**
Other ways to solve the same problem.

**Scope check**
- [ ] This affects the bridge only
- [ ] This affects the HA integration only
- [ ] This requires changes to the wire protocol (both sides)
- [ ] This is documentation-only

**Anything else**
Mockups, links to related projects, references.
